content:
Ive asked on reddit for help but im still a bit lost.
ive running the corp aurita ramona tulu team but is there anything else i should do?
i still have the standard selector.

I'm fairly new aswell and am still at act1 chapter 6 but I think I've got a decent team comp similar to you at the moment.
I play corpo, sanga, hameln, caecus
instead of Hameln/Sanga you could use tulu/Ramona. 
Hameln is a pretty hard boost in my team though, as he is apparently one of, if not the best support character. And Sanga is only very good if you have her with over exalt (1+7 copies), but baseline i think she has better tentacle generation than tulu in early game, bc of her 4a card.
I'm fairly sure Aurita is not very good in early game and especially without copies and the right Team comp.
Celeste could also be a good fit, she is strong in the earlier stages of the game.

Important notes:  caecus wants enlighten 3 (1+3copies) cause that heal is incredibly good. 
Corpo is good as base if you can get her e2 (1+2) that would be optimal.
if you don't like playing counter with caecus you can go full tentacles, for example Corpo/Tulu/Celeste/Sanga
Or  Corpo/Tulu/Celeste/Ramona
If I was you I'd play around Caecus, as you already have his WoD

I recon to run Corpo, goliath, sanga and hameln. if goliath doesnt feel good then you might put aurita back in. also you should take a look at your wheels since you have some very questionable stuff going on there
could also put aigis in for the 1 turn exalt stun if that would help + babies give extra aliemus and crimson furnace is fre hp
i played a bit more and got hamlem, and about my  wheels these are the ones i have
honeslty wheels are the thing that are giving me the biggest problem i dont really understand the game much
im thinking of using this team, in the mean time i will try to get, caecus to e3

Jenkin is the main dps, rest is support. You wanna play jenkin's cards as often as possible to get to her exalt. mice assembly is her main card, which at your level, should one shot the entire board. the more arithmetica you have, the higher the damage, so if you plan to kill everybody with that card, play it first per turn. you can then use annihilation (which is to take the card out of the ultra bar) to just insta play swarm impact.
Hameln is here for strength. his best card is memory rondo which gives strength and draws 2 insight, so make sure you have enough handsize present. you can also play the card for free if you dont have 3 arithmetica. his sould overture is trash and you should always sell it first. his rouse however is the best rouse for your entire team and one of the reasons on why he is an S tier support
Horla has 1 important card: carol psalm. play it first on a turn to get the psalm effect, which boosts all aliemus generation by 21% and adds retain to your teams' cards. thats it, you never go away from that effect + it carries over fights for the entire stage so you never need to play her cards again. also, arithmetica carries over turns so you can hoard a shit ton of it until you draw mice assembly (Jenkin's X cost card) and kill god.
"snarl psalm" gives a 21% final damage buff which is also really good if you are at the final boss but usually you just keep the carol psalm on forever.
Ramona has assault thesis which gives a nice debuff to enemies. NEVER PLAY QUEENS'S SWORD. THE ONLY REASON YOUHAVE THAT CARD IS FOR THE DISCARD TO GIVE YOU FREE KEYFLARE. IF I CATCH YOU PLAYING IT I WILL DELETE YOUR MORIMENS ACCOUNT. YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED. also her rouse is pretty nice since it makes her strike and defense free

Rouse priority: Hameln > Ramona/Jenkin > Horla
thread_title: Pls help explain how to play my team in depth

content: She is not outstanding and only has some use with multiple copies

I'd go for jenkins or winkle.  or both so you get them both e3 
WIth only 3 selectors you can't get either of them to OE right now.

the other 3 standart ultras aren't that good, you don't really have much in the way of caro what you would want (maybe faint , or Uvhash but in his case you would want him on OE (1+7)). Aqua doesn't really make a great combo with Ultra or caro and if you wanna start Aqua team you should probably rather pull the standart banner on Aqua instead of selectors.
If you want you can get maybe Nautila in chaos if you don't have her already
